name: Below a Dark Stairway
description:
You are beneath a dark stairway.  Little light filters through from above,
allowing you to see only a dim passage leading to the south.  You see around
you decaying wood, and a musty smell assails your nostrils.  You look down and
realize you are stepping on some type of feces.

exits.description: You see the dim passage leading south.
You see your way out of this dark hole.
